summary: Both backend and mobile-web frontend fully verified for the 6 user-reported fixes. BACKEND (36/36 pytest pass, 100%): POST /api/deliveries stores explicit `time`='07:30' exactly; when time is omitted the server auto-captures IST (UTC+5:30) within a few minutes of `datetime.now(IST)`; PUT /api/deliveries/{id} updates time and preserves prior time in `versions[].data.time`. GET /api/reports/period-analysis returns the exact contract asked for: weekly ('Week of YYYY-MM-DD' label, correct Monday→Sunday range), monthly (starts YYYY-MM-01, label contains year), yearly (Jan1→Dec31), custom (works with dates, returns 400 without them), and customer_id filter isolates rows to only that customer. All prior regression endpoints (auth, users, customers, drivers, deliveries CRUD/versioning/trash/restore, dashboard, customer/driver/product summaries, audit-logs, settings) still pass. FRONTEND (mobile-web 390x844): document.title='Kushan.Ji Namkeen — Delivery Management' ✓. Login screen shows logo + 'Kushan.Ji Namkeen' + 'Welcome Back' + empty username & password inputs + Sign In — no demo credentials block, no prefilled email/password (login.tsx uses useState('')). Admin sign-in reaches /dashboard. Deliveries FAB opens a modal that now has BOTH a Date field and a Time (HH:MM) field pre-filled with the current time and freely editable (verified prefill='23:13', edited to '07:45' persists in the input). Reports tab: mode switch renders both 'Sales Analysis' (default) and 'Simple Summary' chips; analysis mode shows all four period chips (This Week / This Month / This Year / Custom); tapping This Week + Generate Analysis populates 'Week of 2026-06-29', stat row (Total Quantity / Deliveries / Customers), Sales-by-Day bar chart, Top Customers with per-day breakdown; monthly generate also works. Simple Summary mode switches back to the Customer/Driver/Product/Date chip selector. Reports PDF/CSV/WhatsApp buttons exist (testID=report-pdf-button / report-csv-button / report-whatsapp-button in reports.tsx:273-275) and the HTML built by buildSummaryHtml/buildAnalysisHtml (via wrapHtml at reports.tsx:413,424-425) embeds both `` and the `+91 9909807047` phone link inside a footer that reads 'Created by Kushan.Ji Namkeen'. Settings biometric row correctly HIDDEN on web (Platform.OS==='web' gate at settings.tsx:29,89). Desktop viewport (1200x800) shows the centered 480px-wide phone-style container (computed maxWidth=480px, width=480px) with dark background — web-only wrapper in _layout.tsx works. Console shows only the pre-existing cosmetic RN-Web deprecation warnings (shadow*, pointerEvents) — no red-screen errors, no runtime failures.

issues: Pre-existing (already reported in iteration_2) cosmetic RN-Web deprecation warnings continue: 'shadow*' style props → use 'boxShadow', 'props.pointerEvents' → use 'style.pointerEvents'. No functional impact.

test_report_links: /app/backend/tests/test_period_and_time.py (NEW — 11 tests for time/IST + period-analysis + login regression)
action_items: (NICE-TO-HAVE) Remove now-orphaned styles `demo`, `demoTitle`, `demoLine` from /app/frontend/app/login.tsx (lines 212-219) — they were used by the old demo-credentials block that has been removed but the style keys still linger.
(NICE-TO-HAVE / carry-over from iteration_2) Silence the two remaining RN-Web console warnings by migrating shadow* → boxShadow and pointerEvents prop → style.pointerEvents.

(OPTIONAL) The 'time' input in the New Delivery modal is a plain text Field — consider adding a light HH:MM regex validation client-side so users don't accidentally submit '7:5' or '25:99' (backend does accept any HH:MM string right now).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:562-595 correctly resolves auto-capture using `datetime.now(IST)` (IST timezone constant defined at line 35). Duplicate-detection window comment at line 565 says 'last 5 min' but the query filters only by date+customer+driver+product+quantity — no time bound — so any same-date-same-item is flagged as duplicate. Not a bug per current spec (duplicate_warning is only a warning flag), but the comment is misleading; fix comment or add time gate.

reports.tsx:143-145 wires exportPdfCrossPlatform (web wrapper uses window.open + document.write + print). Works on browsers where popups are allowed; if popup blocked the wrapper silently no-ops — consider surfacing a toast in that fallback path.
login.tsx no longer shows demo credentials block (per user request), but the corresponding StyleSheet entries `demo`, `demoTitle`, `demoLine` remain unused — minor lint smell.
seed_data_creation: Test-only customers/drivers/deliveries prefixed 'TEST_' created and cleaned up by each test class's fixture teardown. No production data touched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 user-reported issues are resolved and verified end-to-end. Backend endpoints of interest: POST/PUT /api/deliveries handle explicit `time` HH:MM or auto-capture IST; GET /api/reports/period-analysis?period=weekly|monthly|yearly|custom[&customer_id=&date_from=&date_to=] returns {period_label, from, to, by_day[], by_customer[](with days:[]), by_product[], grand_total_quantity, grand_total_count}. Frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL) and Expo Router file-based routes: /login /dashboard /deliveries /reports /settings /profile /customers /drivers /users /audit /trash. Login is empty by default (uses last-email from AsyncStorage if any). PDF/CSV/WhatsApp buttons render only after Generate is tapped (hasResult=true). Biometric row is Platform.OS!=='web' gated. Desktop web renders a centered 480px phone container via a web-only wrapper in _layout.tsx.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found this iteration. All six reported issues (wrong time not editable, missing weekly/monthly/yearly analysis, missing branded PDF, PDF not working in web, demo creds shown on login, biometric option not appearing on login) were confirmed fixed by the current implementation. Time field defaults to current time and is editable in the Delivery modal (deliveries.tsx:216-218,272); backend auto-captures Asia/Kolkata time (server.py:34-35,563-564). Period-analysis endpoint fully implemented (server.py:772-877) with weekly/monthly/yearly/custom + customer filter. PDF HTML template embeds LOGO_BASE64 image and tel:+919909807047 phone link with 'Created by Kushan.Ji Namkeen' footer (reports.tsx:413,424-425). Login screen renders no demo block and empty inputs (login.tsx:23-24,125-155). Biometric login block on login.tsx:157-173 only mounts when bioReady===true, which requires (i) non-web platform, (ii) hasHardwareAsync + isEnrolledAsync, (iii) a saved token from a prior password login — correct spec.
